description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a stylized, cartoonish blue creature with very large, upright ears that are pink on the inside. Its body is rounded and plush, with short arms and legs, and a slightly protruding belly. The face features large, black, circular eyes, a wide nose, and a small mouth, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The toy has three small tufts of white hair on top of its head, adding to its playful character. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall build suggests it is lightweight and squeezable. The color palette is primarily blue-gray with accents of pink and white.
description: A plush, blue cartoon creature with large pink ears, black eyes, and a rounded, soft body. It has a friendly face and three white tufts of hair on its head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the creature's face, large pink ears, black eyes, and white hair tufts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ear's thickness, profile of the nose, and arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and ears, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the ear's interior and the side of the face.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, closed mouth. The absence of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, head facing forward.
